---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(brms)
library(tidyverse)
library(BayesFactor)
library(BayesianId)
```

```{r}
data("penguins")
test_data = na.omit(penguins) %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), scale))
levels(test_data$island)
```

```{r}
nc = length(levels(test_data$island)) - 1
contrasts(test_data$island) = contr_banova(nc + 1)
contrasts(test_data$island)
X = model.matrix(~ flipper_len + island, data = test_data)
head(X)
colMeans(X)
```
```{r}
x_names = parse_formula(body_mass ~ flipper_len + bill_len + island)$fixed_main
is_factor = rep(FALSE, times = length(x_names))
for(i in 1:length(x_names)){
  is_factor[i] = is.factor(penguins[, x_names[i]]) | is.character(penguins[, x_names[i]])
}
is_factor
```


```{r}
prep = data.frame(y = c(-2, 9, 1, 8, -3, 1, 7),
                       x1 = factor(c("a", "b", "b", "a", "c", "a", "c")),
                       x2 = c(1, 2, 3, 1, 1, 0, 2),
                       x = c(-1.4, 0.1, 0.8, -0.9, 0.5, -2.4, 12.0)) %>%
  prepare_data(formula = y ~ x1 + x2 + x)
  #prepare_data(formula = y ~ x1 + x2 + x3 + x1:x2 + x2:x3)

X = model.matrix(y ~ x1 + x2 + x,
                 data = prep$data)
head(X)
```

```{r}
# initialize prior adjustment vector
prior_adjust = rep(1.0, times = ncol(X))
names(prior_adjust) = colnames(X)

# loop through numeric predictor variables and adjust the prior by their SDs
# this is equivalent to z-scoring the numeric predictors
for(i in 1:length(prep$x_numeric_names)){ 
  x_name = prep$x_numeric_names[i] # current numeric predictor variables
  has_x = grepl(x_name, colnames(X)) # Is the predictor part of each column in the design matrix?
  print(x_name)
  names(has_x) = colnames(X)
  print(has_x)
  print("")
  prior_adjust[has_x] = prior_adjust[has_x]/sd(X[,x_name]) # if so, adjust for that predictor's standard deviation
}

print(adjust)
```

```{r}
foo = parse_formula(y ~ x1 + x2*x)
```

```{r}
foo
```
```{r}
head(penguins)
```

```{r}
fit = brm_indprior(body_mass ~ flipper_len*bill_len + (flipper_len*bill_len | island), 
         data = test_data,
         chains = 2,
         seed = 1212)
```

```{r}
formula(fit)$formula |> findbars()
```


```{r}
bar = fit_submodels(fit, submodels(formula(fit)))
```

```{r}
library(lme4)
fit_lmer = lmer(body_mass ~ flipper_len*bill_len + (1 | island), 
                data = test_data,
                REML = FALSE)
inc_tests(fit_lmer)
```

```{r}
fit_lm = lm(body_mass ~ flipper_len*bill_len,
            data = test_data)
inc_tests(fit_lm)
```

```{r}
bic_bayes_factors(fit_lm) %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(.x, digits = 2)))
```



```{r}
fit_blmer = blmer(body_mass ~ flipper_len*bill_len + (flipper_len*bill_len | island),
                  data = test_data,
                  REML = FALSE,
                  fixef.prior = normal,
                  cov.prior = gamma)
summary(fit_blmer)
```

```{r}
fit_blmer2 = update(fit_blmer, formula = body_mass ~ flipper_len + bill_len + (flipper_len + bill_len | island))
```

```{r}
fit_list = list(fit_lmer, fit_lmer2)
lapply(fit_list, BIC) |> unlist()
```

```{r}
print(fit_blmer)
```

```{r}
names(fit)
```

```{r}
head(fit$data)
```
